content:
https://lore.kernel.org/all/20251230-gcc-rust-v5-v6-0-2ac86ba728c8@isrc.iscas.ac.cn/

All commits for this patch have already been Acked-by, but it has been stalled for three months without merging into the main branch.

I'm the author of this patch. Are there any further actions needed?
In this scenario, I would recommend to send a new version.

I saw that there are a few different comments to the patch. I would mention in the commit message that you are intentionally running bindgen even if !RUST for simplicity, so that nobody asks the same question again.
